queries.question: For every software engineer, list the corresponding language.
queries.sql: select software_engineers.name , languages.languagename from Software_Engineers_Languages join Software_Engineers on Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_Id = Software_Engineers.EngineerID join Languages on Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_LanguageID = Languages.LanguageID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?languagename WHERE {
  ?software_engineers_languages a :Software_Engineers_Languages .
  ?software_engineers a :Software_Engineers .
  ?software_engineers_languages p:hasSoftware_Engineers ?software_engineers .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?software_engineers_languages p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?software_engineers p:name ?name .
  ?languages p:LanguageName ?languagename .
}

queries.question: What languages does each software engineer know?
queries.sql: SELECT Languages.LanguageName  from Software_Engineers_Languages join Software_Engineers on Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_Id = Software_Engineers.EngineerID join Languages on Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_LanguageID = Languages.LanguageID   GROUP BY Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_LanguageID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Software_Engineers_Languages.SE_Id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Software_Engineers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What languages does each software engineer know?
